title: Kits
body:
Overview
This plugin provides a complete kit management system with a modern and intuitive GUI for players and admins. It includes permission control, cooldown support, placeholder integration, and full customization options.

Player Features

- Open the kit menu with /kit
- Claim kits with built in cooldown support
- Permission based access control
- Custom display items with editable names and lore
- Fully configurable messages
- PlaceholderAPI support
- Optional scoreboard integration

Admin Features

- Open the admin GUI with /kit admin
- Separate management interface for administrators
- Drag and drop kits to change their menu position
- Create new kits directly inside the GUI
- Right click a kit to open the editor
- Edit the complete kit layout in a dedicated inventory
- Save kit items with exact slot positions
- Middle click to import your current inventory into a kit
- Shift + Left Click to edit the cooldown via chat
- Shift + Right Click to edit the required permission via chat
- Double click to receive a kit with bypass permission
- Configurable filler and help items
- Automatic slot saving when closing the admin menu

  ![kits menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb5eff99e226416104211be41eca961aa66f21a0.png)
